globalElectives.label: Global Studies Electives
globalElectives.note: Three electives (9 credits) chosen from the tagged Global Studies course pools organized by region (Africa, Asia, Europe, Latin America, Middle East) and the General Global Studies list, including at least one general (non-area-specific) course. Electives must be taken from at least two units in total (two departments or programs).
